title: AgentOps-Bench: Measuring What Production Operators Actually Care About in LLM Agents
description: AgentOps-Bench is a six-axis evaluation framework for LLM agents (completion, cost, efficiency, reliability, recovery, safety) with an instrumented tool server, five failure-mode injectors, and a 15-entry indirect prompt-injection catalogue. This release ships the harness, twenty seed tasks across five domains, the snapshotted tool-call fixtures used in the pilot, and the 1,080-run pilot results across six frontier-class agents (Claude Haiku 4.5 / Sonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.7, GPT-5.4-mini, GPT-5.5, o4-mini).
